step_by_step_thinking:
Tafenoquine's primary use mentioned across different articles is specifically highlighted in relation to preventing relapse of P. vivax malaria through radical cure. Therefore,
\boxed{A} Based on the detailed review of the evidence provided, tafenoquine is primarily described as being used clinically for the "Radical cure of Plasmodium vivax," addressing its unique ability to eliminate latent parasites in the liver stage responsible for future recurrences of the disease. Hence, option A correctly identifies its main application.
raw_response:

\boxed{A} Based on the detailed review of the evidence provided, tafenoquine is primarily described as being used clinically for the "Radical cure of Plasmodium vivax," addressing its unique ability to eliminate latent parasites in the liver stage responsible for future recurrences of the disease. Hence, option A correctly identifies its main application. \boxed{A}
